experiments.title: Shorter subject line
experiments.hypothesis: Trimming the subject to under 45 characters lifts open and reply rate in tier-1 senior channels.
experiments.channel: Senior Living / Assisted, Caregiver / Senior Resource
experiments.next_step: Author A/B variant and reserve next 6 tier-1 sends for the shorter subject.

experiments.title: Materials-first senior follow-up
experiments.hypothesis: Leading the follow-up with the seminar materials packet (no second ask) converts the prior positive materials request into a scheduled session.
experiments.next_step: Operator sends materials packet today; CC ops only after positive engagement, per guardrail.

experiments.title: Hospice oral-comfort resource angle
experiments.hypothesis: A clinical resource framing (oral comfort for end-of-life patients) outperforms generic seminar pitch in hospice/home-health.
experiments.next_step: Draft resource-led variant; reserve next 4 hospice sends for this angle.

experiments.title: Phone/form follow-up for no-email high-fit
experiments.hypothesis: High-fit senior-living and home-care orgs without a public email convert via phone or contact-form follow-up at meaningfully higher rates than waiting for email enrichment.
experiments.channel: Senior Living / Assisted, Home Care / Hospice / Health
experiments.next_step: Operator works the no-email shortlist daily; log outcomes back to the Sheet.

experiments.title: Reply-rate baseline lock
experiments.hypothesis: Holding subject and body constant for 20 sends per tier-1 channel produces a stable reply-rate baseline to compare future copy tests against.
experiments.next_step: Define control copy; lock variant rotation cadence after EXP-01 and EXP-03 complete.

google_ads_insights.title: Google Ads Waste Watch
google_ads_insights.subtitle: Paid media office watch for the linked Google Ads child account. Manager-account, customer IDs, and account labels are intentionally not exposed in the public mirror. Recommendations are dashboard-only and do not change the live account.
google_ads_insights.automation_status: Included in the consolidated weekday patient-acquisition operating loop; recommendations are dashboard-only and no Google Ads changes are made without explicit confirmation.

coverage.office_label_policy: First linked office account - mapping pending. Office identifiers and account IDs are never exposed in the public mirror; campaign-name groupings are used as a safer office hint where available.

risk_summary.note: High-risk campaigns currently absorb the largest share of spend without matching conversion volume. Prioritize search-query review and negative-keyword sweeps before raising any budget.

recommended_budget_shift.guardrail: Do not shift budget until call/booking quality is verified; then move in small weekly increments.

flags: CPA more than triple account average
campaigns.recommended_action: Tighten immediately: pause or bid-cap high-CPC insurance/provider ad groups, then rebuild around appointment intent.

decision_detail.what_to_change: Pause or bid-cap the high-CPC insurance/provider ad groups, then rebuild around appointment intent.
decision_detail.why: CPA $170.91 and CPC $10.33 are elevated; the campaign uses 24.3% of spend with only 11 conversions.
next_steps: Pause zero-conversion ad groups with CPC above $15 until search terms are reviewed.
Separate insurance research terms from booking terms.
Add negatives around plan directories, member login, jobs, free-only, and generic provider-list searches.
Route emergency/appointment terms to location-specific pages with click-to-call above the fold.

flags: Conversion rate under 2% on highest-click search campaign
campaigns.recommended_action: Cut or rebuild: reduce budget 50-75% or pause while rebuilding around high-intent Denti-Cal appointment terms.

decision_detail.what_to_change: Reduce budget 50-75% or pause while rebuilding into high-intent Denti-Cal appointment terms only.
decision_detail.why: CPA $264.91 is far above account CPA $54.48; conversion rate is 1.5% on $1,589.43 spend.
next_steps: Pull search terms and add negatives for eligibility, coverage-only, provider-list, job, and informational queries.
Split exact-match appointment/provider intent from exploratory terms.
Use a Denti-Cal-specific landing page with accepted insurance, same-day appointment CTA, and call tracking.
Hold budget increases until CPA is near the office account average for two consecutive weeks.

decision_detail.what_to_change: No immediate budget cut; continue search-term and conversion-quality review.
decision_detail.why: Performance does not currently meet high-risk thresholds.
next_steps: Review weekly for CPA drift, conversion quality, and limited status causes.
Compare asset-group performance against Insurance PMax (benchmark CPA).

flags: Best CPA and conversion rate in the account

decision_detail.what_to_change: Keep active; consider shifting budget from high-risk search only after call/booking quality is confirmed.

flags: Very high CPC; thin click volume

_sanitization.policy: Public dashboard exposes only aggregate metrics, category/status summaries, redacted operator action items, operating guardrails, and aggregated Google Ads campaign and ad-group metrics. Individual prospect emails, prospect names, reply sender names/addresses, free-text reply summaries, the operations Google Sheet ID and URL, recipient-level batch details, private operations-repo commit hashes, and Google Ads manager/customer account identifiers are removed.
